exec: // Default auth: project-editor JWT on project A (sufficient for most happy-path steps).

item.name: REG-RD-SETUP — Setup: create shared REGIONAL registry {{rdRegId}} (regionId, REG-1 F4)

exec: if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('rdRegId', String(v));
// bounded read-your-writes retry over the owner-tuple materialization window
// (eventual-consistency); retries SELF only on 403/404 of own fresh resource.
const _ard = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - _ard < 600) { /* owner-tuple materialization wait */ }

item.name: REG-RD-F4-PLACEMENT-REGIONAL — Get REGIONAL registry → regionId echoed, placementType REGIONAL, zoneId absent (anycast)

exec: const _pd = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - _pd < 500) { /* EC read-your-writes wait */ }
pm.test('zoneId absent (regional-anycast, zone-independent)', () => pm.expect(j.zoneId === undefined || j.zoneId === '').to.be.true);

item.name: REG-RD-F4-NEG-REGION-REQUIRED — Create without regionId → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT ("regionId is required"), no Operation
REG-RD-F4-NEG-REGION-NOTFOUND — Create with nonexistent regionId → FAILED_PRECONDITION (code 9) peer-validate geo
REG-RD-F4-NEG-REGION-IMMUTABLE — Update updateMask=regionId / placementType → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT (immutable placement anchor)

exec: pm.test('regionId immutable text', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.eql('regionId is immutable after Registry.Create'));
pm.test('placementType immutable text', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.eql('placementType is immutable after Registry.Create'));

item.name: REG-RD-F1-FIELD-ABSENCE — Get registry → body has NO globalSlug/displayName/top-level visibility/infra fields

exec: const _pd = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - _pd < 500) { /* EC read-your-writes wait */ }
pm.test('no globalSlug (ban #15: URL carries immutable id, not a slug)', () => pm.expect(j).to.not.have.property('globalSlug'));
pm.test('no displayName (UI pretty-name lives in labels)', () => pm.expect(j).to.not.have.property('displayName'));
pm.test('no top-level visibility (authoritative gate is per-repo)', () => pm.expect(j).to.not.have.property('visibility'));

item.name: REG-RD-F1-NEG-ID-IMMUTABLE — Update updateMask=id → 400 (id immutable); POST :rename → route absent (no id-rename)

exec: pm.test('id immutable text', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.eql('id is immutable after Registry.Create'));

if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
pm.test('endpoint unchanged (derived by id, not name)', () => pm.expect(j.endpoint||'').to.eql(pm.environment.get('rnEndpointBefore')));
const j = pm.response.json(); if (j && j.id) pm.environment.set('opId', String(j.id));
